abilities.name: Unimpeded
abilities.description: Ignores terrain penalties when taking Movement Actions.

actions: (1) Circular Sawblade (Pneumatic) | AV: 5 (11) | Rg: y2 | Resist: Df | Target suffers 2/3/4 damage, ignoring Armor. Tome Heated Metal: After, target gains Burning +1. Crow Mangle: Choose one armor worn, destroy it.
(1) Self-Repair | Use scrap pile within 2 yards to heal 2 damage. Pile mass roughly large dog.
system.notes: Purpose-built combat constructs modeled on Steam Arachnid design. Industrial saw blades. Especially effective vs armored targets. Self-repair capability.
